candidates.why: Direct match to total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not the target; this is non-current assets, included only because it was in the shortlist.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line and best match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash balance; useful cross-check but balance sheet cash is preferred for CHE.
Cash-like label but not the primary balance-sheet measure.
Appears to be change/reconciliation rather than ending balance.
Non-cash adjustment, not cash balance.
Non-cash adjustment, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate difference in cash and cash
candidates.why: FX effect on cash, not the cash balance.
Non-cash adjustment, not cash balance.
Cash flow item, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Preferred the balance sheet cash line over cash flow reconciliation lines.

candidates.why: Direct match to total current liabilities.
Only a component/subheading, not total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not total.
Component of current liabilities, not total.
Non-current liabilities, not the target.
Non-current liabilities, not the target.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean balance-sheet total for short-term interest-bearing debt/current borrowings; excludes the separate lease liability row.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Represents current maturities of long-term debt in some years, but using it together with current interest-bearing liabilities could double count.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean reported current interest-bearing debt total. Excluded 'Short-term liabilities, right of use assetrented properties' per lease exclusion rule, and did not add 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable on the balance sheet.
Tax-related current liability but appears payroll/withholding specific rather than total taxes payable.
Payroll/social tax accrual, not clearly taxes payable in the accounting-variable sense.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but 'Tax liabilities' is a confident direct match.

candidates.why: Direct match to PPE on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE line.
Only a possible component of PPE, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Depreciation Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex cash flow, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Disposal cash flow, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Divestment of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Disposal cash flow, not PPE stock.
Income/cash flow adjustment, not PPE stock.
